message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and beads issue tracker

Cargo.lock: add fcp-llm-router, hmac/sha2/subtle/hex (stripe webhooks),
base64 (m365), chrono/toml (vectordb/telegram) dependencies.
Issue tracker: close completed connector issues with delivery notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1897,6 +1897,8 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
+ "fcp-discord",
+ "fcp-manifest",
  "fcp-sdk",
  "fcp-testkit",
  "futures-util",

+]
